summary: Completed all 8 steps in TDD order. Created dashboard/src/dashboard/data/memory.py with 3 functions: mcp_tool_call (generic JSON-RPC transport), get_memory_status (get_status tool with offline fallback), get_queue_stats (get_queue_stats tool with offline fallback). Hardened mcp_tool_call against malformed responses (missing content, invalid JSON, empty arrays). All 12 tests pass across 4 test classes: TestMcpToolCall (3), TestGetMemoryStatus (3), TestGetQueueStats (3), TestMalformedResponse (3). Used httpx.MockTransport for all test mocking.
